meaning: to be connected to or linked with something in people minds or in reality
chineseMeaning: 与……有关联；与……相连；被联系到……
anchorSentence: High stress levels are often associated with poor sleep and reduced productivity.
collocations: be closely / strongly / commonly associated with
be associated with increased risk / higher cost / better outcomes
notes: be associated with vs be related to: associated with stresses cognitive or statistical linkage, common in research and branding; related to is more general. Active form: associate A with B (I associate coffee with early mornings). Do not confuse associate with assist.
recallQuestions: 那朵一出现人们就立刻拿雨伞的乌云，对应哪个英文短语？
be associated with 和 be related to 有什么细微差别？
用 be associated with 写一句和你的工作、技术或学习环境有关的英文句子。
